requests.prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal editorial studio runway. Use a poised adult fashion model as the only moving person. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama behind. The lighting is soft and warm, with a subtle frontal key and a gentle rim that defines the coat’s edges. The scene is quiet and uncluttered, with no audience and no extra props. The camera slowly pushes in as the model performs a measured, graceful pivot from a three-quarter stance toward a front-facing position. Keep arms relaxed at the sides and avoid exaggerated gestures. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, stable body pose, and stable product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.

image_inputs.description: Video start frame used as first-frame I2V conditioning by the video backend.
Product identity reference for optional start-frame image-edit generation. It is not sent to the video backend as a separate product-reference conditioning image.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Premium best signals the coat’s luxury fabric, refined tailoring, and sophisticated silhouette through restrained staging, elegant light, and a poised on-body presentation.

candidate_categories.reason: Quiet, high-end presence highlights silk-cotton texture, silhouette, and tailoring without clutter.
candidate_categories.risk: Model consistency and fabric stability under soft motion.

candidate_categories.reason: Close-in compositions can show texture and stitch lines.
candidate_categories.risk: Tiny detail proofs may be too subtle for small open-source video models.

candidate_categories.reason: Contextual city or boutique scenes could suggest real-world sophistication.
candidate_categories.risk: Crowds, complex backgrounds, and walk cycles reduce stability and premium signal.

candidate_categories.reason: Little to 'prove' functionally; it is a fashion statement piece.
candidate_categories.risk: Forcing functional demos would feel contrived and visually minor.

candidate_categories.reason: Could dramatize glamour with stylized moves.
candidate_categories.risk: Risk of fabric warping or unrealistic motion undermining credibility.

creative_design.selling_angle: The refined oatmeal beige long trench in silk-cotton faille that reads instantly premium and editorial, making any entrance feel composed and sophisticated.
creative_design.visual_grammar: Editorial studio runway with a single poised model, warm commercial light, negative space, slow camera push-in, and a subtle body turn.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: On-body silhouette, controlled drape, and soft light revealing the silk-cotton faille surface and polished heritage details.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: Model already wearing the trench in a three-quarter pose under a warm spotlight on a minimal cream runway.
creative_design.action_arc: From a composed three-quarter stance, the model performs a slow, measured pivot toward camera as the camera gently pushes in.
creative_design.payoff: A front-facing composed hold that showcases the belted waist, collar, and long elegant line of the coat.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: Kept to one model, one scene, and one slow pivot to avoid fabric flutter or complex walking. No hand close-ups or belt-tying. Neutral runway set with soft, even lighting ensures material reads without relying on tiny details or logos.

metadata.overlay_text:
Burberry Foxfield Trench
Silk–cotton faille. Refined oatmeal beige.
metadata.audio_direction: Subtle premium ambient score with soft piano tones; no voiceover; clean studio sound.
metadata.visual_prompt: A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway with a cream cyclorama behind. The lighting is soft and warm, with a subtle frontal key and a gentle rim that defines the coat’s edges. The scene is quiet and uncluttered, with no audience and no extra props. The camera slowly pushes in as the model performs a measured, graceful pivot from a three-quarter stance toward a front-facing position. Keep arms relaxed at the sides and avoid exaggerated gestures. Let the silk-cotton faille surface catch the light softly, showing a refined drape without flutter or wind. As the camera nears a medium-full view, the model faces camera and holds a composed posture for a brief moment, emphasizing the belted waist, collar line, and long silhouette. Maintain stable lighting and minimal movement, ending on a still, premium portrait of the trench.

critic_expectation.purpose: Judge whether the raw video is a plausible product demo for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat.
hard_requirements: single continuous raw video shot with steady one-take continuity

complete direct prompt: A single elegant shot in a minimal editorial studio runway. Begin with the same model and scene as the first frame: the poised adult model already wearing the real oatmeal beige long trench coat, fully belted, standing centered on a warm cream runway.
physically plausible handling of the product by one main subject
soft_context: The shot may hint at this customer context: Feeling underdressed or generic when a moment calls for polished elegance and a refined silhouette.
Focus the judgment on the requested product action, proof visibility, and one-take continuity.

Creative design expectation: ad_category=premium; hook=Model already wearing the trench in a three-quarter pose under a warm spotlight on a minimal cream runway.; proof=On-body silhouette, controlled drape, and soft light revealing the silk-cotton faille surface and polished heritage details.; payoff=A front-facing composed hold that showcases the belted.

Expected subject and scene style from asset memory: A poised adult fashion model with an elegant, neutral expression and balanced proportions.; The Burberry long trench worn fully belted; simple neutral.
quality_checks: stable face, hands, objects, and camera motion
main product action is visible and easy to understand
visible product appearance stays consistent with the product reference image
ad_category intent is recognizable through the opening, action arc, proof mechanism, and payoff
